    select
        al1_0.al_id,

        al1_0.changed_date,

        c1_0.cja_description,
        al1_0.courthouse_code,
        al1_0.courthouse_name,
        al1_0.user_name,
        al1_0.application_list_date,
        al1_0.is_deleted,
        al1_0.delete_by,
        al1_0.delete_date,
        al1_0.list_description,
        al1_0.duration_hour,
        al1_0.duration_minute,
        al1_0.other_courthouse,
        al1_0.application_list_status,
        al1_0.application_list_time,
        al1_0.id,
        al1_0.version 
    from
        appreg.application_lists al1_0 
    left join
        appreg.criminal_justice_area c1_0 
            on c1_0.cja_id=al1_0.cja_cja_id 
    where
        (
            ? is null 
            or al1_0.application_list_status=?
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or al1_0.courthouse_code=?
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or al1_0.cja_cja_id=?
        ) 
        and (
            al1_0.application_list_date=coalesce(?, al1_0.application_list_date)
        ) 
        and (
            al1_0.application_list_time=coalesce(?, al1_0.application_list_time)
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or lower(al1_0.list_description) like ('%'||lower(cast(? as varchar))||'%') escape ''
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or lower(al1_0.other_courthouse) like ('%'||lower(cast(? as varchar))||'%') escape ''
        ) 
    order by
        al1_0.list_description 
    fetch
        first ? rows only

    select
        al1_0.al_id,
        al1_0.changed_by,
        al1_0.changed_date,
        c1_0.cja_id,
        c1_0.cja_code,
        c1_0.cja_description,
        al1_0.courthouse_code,
        al1_0.courthouse_name,
        al1_0.user_name,
        al1_0.application_list_date,
        al1_0.is_deleted,
        al1_0.delete_by,
        al1_0.delete_date,
        al1_0.list_description,
        al1_0.duration_hour,
        al1_0.duration_minute,
        al1_0.other_courthouse,
        al1_0.application_list_status,
        al1_0.application_list_time,
        al1_0.id,
        al1_0.version 
    from
        appreg.application_lists al1_0 
    left join
        appreg.criminal_justice_area c1_0 
            on c1_0.cja_id=al1_0.cja_cja_id 
    where
        (
            ? is null 
            or al1_0.application_list_status=?
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or al1_0.courthouse_code=?
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or al1_0.cja_cja_id=?
        ) 
        and (
            al1_0.application_list_date=coalesce(?, al1_0.application_list_date)
        ) 
        and (
            al1_0.application_list_time=coalesce(?, al1_0.application_list_time)
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or lower(al1_0.list_description) like ('%'||lower(cast(? as varchar))||'%') escape ''
        ) 
        and (
            ? is null 
            or lower(al1_0.other_courthouse) like ('%'||lower(cast(? as varchar))||'%') escape ''
        ) 
    order by
        al1_0.list_description 
    offset
        ? rows 
    fetch
        first ? rows only
